source: enemy-ai-overview.md (RE doc) + VERIFIED against SLES decomp
architecture: factory + state-machine + per-frame tick callback. ~30 of 121 entity types are distinct enemy behaviors.

verified_in_decomp.EnemyAIUpdateWithRandomization @ FUN_800: CONFIRMED: decrements ai_timer[+0x101]; on 0 -> ai_random_value[+0x100]=rand()&7, timer=(rand()&0x1f)+0x20 (32-63 frames); EntityUpdateCallback; off-screen cleanup via SendMessage(state,3); CollisionCheckWrapper(.,4,0x1002,0) for projectile hits.
verified_in_decomp.boss_HP: CONFIRMED g_pPlayerState[0x1D]=5 (line 15315); decremented + checked==0 for boss death (15540/15589). Max ~4-5 hits.

entity_ai_fields.+0x12: collision mask u16 (0x0002=enemy layer collides w/ player)

behavior_patterns.patrol: walk constant speed, turn on wall OR ledge (no-floor-ahead). gravity = player gravity. (doc pseudo-code; core verified.)
behavior_patterns.flying: horizontal speed + sine-table vertical oscillation (counter&0xFF), no gravity, optional player-Y tracking
behavior_patterns.shooter: shoot_timer countdown, fire projectile if player in range (~200-300px), interval 60-120f
behavior_patterns.chase: idle->chase (player in range)->attack; push_x toward player

hit_sounds: EnemyHitMessageHandler plays random sounds from tables @0x8009bb84/90/9c on msgs 0x24825800/0x308b4800; gated by sound_cooldown[+0x116]=180f. msg 0x1002=projectile hit (boss HP--), 0x1019=positional sound.
note: AI is genuinely real and modest: randomized-timer behavior switching + a small state set + per-type tick. Not scripted/complex — classic 2D platformer enemy AI.
